title: @johnennis: My latest article, introducing a new concept of conceptual review that sits between reviewing for correctness/completion and explicit testing
rawContent:
Tweet by @johnennis (John Ennis)
Author bio: Math PhD, AI postdoc, author of @elves_skill
Text: My latest article, introducing a new concept of conceptual review that sits between reviewing for correctness/completion and explicit testing

In my experience, preventing unexpected regressions is the biggest outstanding problem with agentic coding, and this is my best current attempt to fix it

This is live in the latest version of @elves_skill

Let me know what you think!
